caribbean.headline: Heavy Rainfall Impacts San Juan with Moderate Winds
caribbean.paragraph: San Juan is experiencing heavy rainfall with a 96% chance of precipitation today, accompanied by moderate northeast winds at 11 knots and wave heights reaching 4.7 feet. Nearby Turks and Caicos sees slightly stronger winds at 16 knots but less rainfall, maintaining generally unsettled marine conditions across the eastern Caribbean.

mediterranean.headline: Calm Seas and Moderate Winds in Mediterranean Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing moderate westerly winds reaching 17 knots with wave heights up to 4.1 feet and an 11-second swell period. Rain chances remain moderate at 40 percent while Dubrovnik sees lighter winds near 13 knots, maintaining generally stable marine conditions across the region.
